_schema.id: Unique identifier, e.g. gr_001. Prefix matches the deck (gr = Greek).
_schema.category: Groups cards into tabs: dinosaurs, animals, colors, numbers, food, vehicles
_schema.translation: Translation in the learner's base language (e.g. English for an English speaker)
_schema.emoji: Fallback visual — always shown if image is missing
_schema.image: Optional. Relative path to image file, e.g. images/animals/elephant.jpg
